title: DogCraft
description: Fabric modpack focused on adventure, multiplayer and creativity, compiled by GamerDog. Play with friends!
body:
![DogcraftBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8CWNeizA/images/e525ac746c88da5702cb1567b4113490243b3a3d.png)
0.8.0 and prior ### NOTE: A release specifically optimized for the Steam Deck is planned for release soon. ### I recommend allocating a maximum of 6GB of RAM for the modpack. If you run into any stuttering I would recommend increasing it or tweaking your graphics settings. ### Feedback? Make sure to join the Discord so I can know! It's pretty much just me testing the modpack so any and all feedback is welcome. ## What DogCraft is a compilation of carefully picked and considered mods with a heavy multiplayer friendly focus to make the game significantly more enjoyable for a plethora of play styles. Whether you're focused on adventure, building, engineering, cooking, potion making, animal taming, fighting, wizardry, or maybe even just goofing and gaffing, the modpack should have plenty for you. ## Why I originally started making modpacks for me and my buddies starting about a year and a half ago and realized it was way more fun than I thought it would be. I figured I'd found plenty of the amazing mods and found at least a few I'd never seen any other pack play around with before and needed to share the fun with everyone else. ## Credit This modpack uses the [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) modpack by [Devin](https://modrinth.com/user/Devin) as a base with a number of modifications to the original config. Extra special thank you to [minet6759_](https://curseforge.com/members/minet6759_) and [Orcinus](https://curseforge.com/members/orcinus73) and for their express permission of the use of the mods [Vanilla Degus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanilla-degus) and [Hedgehogs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hedgehogs-fabric) respectively. A special thanks to [auxves](https://modrinth.com/user/auxves) as well for the [Disco](https://modrinth.com/mod/disco) mod that made it very easy to generate the dogs discs mod that adds special music to the game. Lastly, thank you to [tiptox](https://twitter.com/tiptoxxx) for making the banner.
